theme: Light & Dark Mode (System Detected + Manual Toggle)
archetype: Performance Pro with Organic & Earthy Tones (Green/Blue on Slate)

styling_rules.glassmorphism: Use Expo BlurView combined with NativeWind. For Dark Mode: View layer with bg-slate-900/40 and border border-slate-700/50. For Light Mode: View layer with bg-white/60 and border border-white/40.
styling_rules.spacing: Mobile-first generous spacing. Use p-4 to p-6 for main screen padding. Maintain gap-4 between list items.
styling_rules.borders: Heavy use of rounded-3xl for major cards and bottom sheets, rounded-full for action buttons.
styling_rules.shadows: Minimal solid shadows or colored glow for primary buttons: shadow-[0_8px_16px_rgba(34,197,94,0.3)].

buttons.primary: bg-[#22C55E] rounded-full py-4 px-6 flex-row items-center justify-center shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800 rounded-full py-4 px-6 flex-row items-center justify-center border border-slate-700

components.progress_rings: SVG circles managed by Reanimated 3 for smooth stroke-dashoffset transitions. Stroke width 12, strokeLinecap 'round'.
components.bottom_sheet: View with absolute bottom-0 w-full rounded-t-3xl pt-2 pb-8 px-6. Must include a top drag handle (w-12 h-1 rounded-full bg-slate-400).

screens.onboarding: 3 Steps: Goal, Level, Style. Full-screen background images with heavy gradient overlays (bg-black/60) to ensure text contrast. Absolute positioned glass cards for options.
screens.home_dashboard: Header with user profile and Duolingo-style streak counter. Large Apple-style progress rings in center. 'AI Coach' quick-action card. 'Start Workout' sticky CTA at bottom.
screens.workout_plans: Horizontal swipeable cards for different categories (Running, Lifting, Yoga). Use Reanimated Carousel effect. Bottom sheet expands on tap for workout details.
screens.active_workout: Massive timer (Outfit font, text-6xl, tracking-tighter). Circular progress. Haptic play/pause controls. Swipe to end.
screens.ai_coach_chat: Chat interface. User bubbles (solid surface), AI bubbles (glassmorphism with primary accent). Use animated typing indicator.
screens.progress_analytics: Victory-native or pure SVG+Reanimated charts. Bar charts for weekly calories, line chart for weight. Glassmorphism wrapper.
screens.challenges: Grid layout (bento box style). Achievement badges with conditional grayscale (if locked) or neon glow (if unlocked).
screens.profile: Settings list with row items. Toggles for themes and notifications. Logout button.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='start-workout-button').

images.description: grayscale photo of man working out
person about to lift the barbel

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use React Native Expo SDK 54 with NativeWind for styling. Do NOT use standard CSS or Tailwind classes meant for DOM elements (e.g., hover:, focus: rings). Use NativeWind compatible classes.
Use expo-blur for all Glassmorphism effects. Wrap the BlurView with a View that has rounded borders and overflow-hidden.
Implement the bottom tab navigation via expo-router (Tabs).
Use react-native-reanimated for animations: progress rings, swipeable cards, button scales, and screen transitions.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. DO NOT skip this.
Do NOT use mock placeholder URLs for images, use ONLY the URLs provided in the media section.
Fonts: Use standard RN font loading or Expo Google Fonts (Outfit and Inter).
